title: Dynamic Trees - TFC Community Edition
description: Unofficial port of the original mod from Forge 1.20.1 to Neoforge 1.21.1.
body:
**Unofficial port of the original mod from Forge 1.20.1 to Neoforge 1.21.1.**

Dynamic Trees TFC is an addition to TFC and dynamic trees. The mod replaces the usual TFC trees with full-fledged dynamic trees with realistic growth.

Now the trees are growing gradually, they differ in shape and size, and the forests look much more vibrant and atmospheric. The mod also takes into account the climate and seasons in TerraFirmaCraft, making different types of trees look different depending on the environment.

**Opportunities:**
- Dynamic trees for TerraFirmaCraft
- Realistic growth and reproduction
- TFC Seasons and Climate support
- More beautiful and vibrant forests
- Compatibility with Dynamic Trees and TerraFirmaCraft. 

Original mod: [Dynamic Trees - TFC](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreestfc)
